rationale: Educ. Code §11.001 governs school district accreditation and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Each school district must be accredited by the agency as provided by Subchapter C, Chapter 39.
_note: Rule text concerns accreditation only; no fiscal or operational linkage to homestead exemption levels is present in this provision.
